#   Navarro-Mora, A. (2023). "Structural and design values of timber beams."
#   Drvna Industrija, 74. DOI 10.5552/drvind.2023.0007
# Targeted here against an Elsevier structural journal (Engineering Structures)
# to exercise the elsarticle route, highlights and CRediT. Body is abridged.
title:
  en: Structural and design values of plantation timber beams under bending
language: en
authors:
  - name: Angel Navarro-Mora
    orcid: 0000-0002-0539-7014
    affiliation: Escuela de Ingenieria en Construccion, Instituto Tecnologico de Costa Rica
    email: ahnavarro@itcr.ac.cr
    corresponding: true
abstract:
  en: >
    Bending tests on plantation timber beams are used to derive characteristic
    structural and design values following a reliability-based framework. The
    modulus of elasticity and the bending strength are characterized for the
    species, and partial factors are calibrated so that the resulting design
    values meet a target reliability index. The derived values are compared
    with code references and discussed for their use in timber design practice
    in tropical regions.
keywords:
  en: [timber, bending, characteristic values, reliability, design]
highlights:
  - Characteristic bending values are derived for plantation timber beams.
  - Partial factors are calibrated to a target reliability index.
  - Derived design values are compared against code references.
declarations:
  credit: "A. Navarro-Mora: conceptualization, methodology, analysis, writing."
  competing-interests: "The author declares no competing interests."
  data-availability: "Data are available from the author on reasonable request."
  funding: "This research received no specific external funding."
  ai-disclosure: "No generative AI tools were used in preparing this manuscript."
bibliography: navarro_timber_beam_values.bib
---

# Introduction

Reliability-based derivation of design values for timber is well established
for graded structural lumber [@en338].

# Materials and methods

Four-point bending tests are performed and characteristic values are obtained
following standard fractile estimation.

# Results and discussion

The calibrated partial factors yield design values consistent with the target
reliability index.

# Conclusions

The framework provides traceable design values for plantation timber beams.
